title: Shorten the authored asset dropdown label
summary: Renamed the authored screen asset path so the CommunityUnityAsset dropdown no longer shows the inherited long PlayerScreenCore2018 path.
reasoning: The old authored asset path was too long and too legacy-shaped in the VaM asset picker. This version cleaned the label without changing the phase-1 contract of loading the versioned assetbundle and attaching the matching plugin.

changes.summary: Renamed the authored screen asset folder to Assets/FrameAngel/PlayerScreen and the prefab to fa_player_screen.prefab.
changes.reasoning: The dropdown label comes from the authored asset name inside the assetbundle, so the Unity source path had to be simplified at the source.

changes.summary: Updated the demo-scene fallback asset name to assets/frameangel/playerscreen/fa_player_screen.prefab.
changes.reasoning: The deterministic witness scene must target the same authored asset name that ships in the bundle.

changes.summary: Rebuilt and redeployed the matching 0.1.2 assetbundle and plugin pair.
changes.reasoning: A deployment-worthy user-facing change needed its own versioned artifact pair and commit.

verification: Built and deployed fa_cua_player.0.1.2.dll and fa_player_asset.0.1.2.assetbundle.
Confirmed the exported asset name resolved to assets/frameangel/playerscreen/fa_player_screen.prefab.
knownIssues: Screen-core presentation still showed aspect and extra-surface issues in live testing.
Transport recovery work remained in progress.
